name: RPlog_Unfortunate_Escort
title: Unfortunate Escort: A Lopsided Dogfight over Renaal IV
summary: Hunting lightly trafficked Imperial systems in a stripped, transponderless Z-95 Headhunter, the renegade Gren Delede slips into the backwater Renaal IV system to scan an Imperial convoy. When the bored Imperial escort pilot Liza Molokai (Delta 2) and her wingman Delta 3 break off to investigate the unidentified blip, Delede engages, swiftly destroying Delta 3 and crippling Liza's Interceptor with superior speed and gunnery. Rather than finish off the outmatched young pilot, Delede transmits a scrambled warning urging her to eject, and she does, her TIE exploding behind her as her emergency beacon begins its lonely transmission. Having gathered the convoy scans he came for and added two more kill markers to his hull, Delede waggles his wings in a mocking salute and jumps to hyperspace, leaving the stranded Liza to await rescue.
